strategy.title: Todolist
strategy.vision: A task system that thinks alongside me — surfacing what matters most each day from everything I've committed to, learned, and reflected on.
strategy.where_to_play: Single user (Michael), CLI + mobile web + /morning skill integration. Tasks, priorities, relationships, and context in one owned system.
principles: Landscape over directives — show the full picture, let me decide
Frictionless capture, rich context later — one-liners in, enrichment during planning
Deep integration over standalone value — composable pieces that optimize individually
jtbd_now: Reflect and reshape in one flow

gaps: MCP servers are agent-facing not human-facing
Taskwarrior data model but no AI
AI tools are cloud-only walled gardens

selection.howToWin: A CLI-first task backend on Supabase that Claude Code and agents can read/write natively — no frontend needed because any UI can be generated on demand.

no_gos: No NLP date parsing in V1

rabbit_holes.avoidance: Two link types: parent/child and related
Thin CLI bridge via Discord or Shortcuts
Simple urgency scoring. AI lives in /morning skill.

constraints: Accessible from any machine via Supabase
Share Supabase instance with Morning Brew
